@graph.schema:name: The Humpback Whale Sentinel Programme (HWSP)
@graph.schema:description: The Humpback Whale Sentinel Programme is a long term biomonitoring programme of the circum-polar Antarctic sea-ice ecosystem. It is the primary surveillance activity of the Antarctic Monitoring and Assessment Programme (AnMAP), and is designed to support exisiting biomonitoring programmes under the Convention for the Conservation of Antarctic Marine Living Resources (CCAMLR) Ecosystem Monitoring Program (CEP). To date it encompasses five of six International Whaling Comission Antarctic management areas, corresponding to the feeding areas of six southern hemisphere humpback whale breeding stocks (A, C, D, EI, EII, G).

schema:geo.schema:description: Bounding box polygon with lat long (Y X) coordinate order.
